summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No GitHub mutations, merges, or fix PRs are planned. Closed hydrated PRs are kept closed; open hydrated PRs are classified independently for normal maintainer review/proof gates; unhydrated refs are scoped to needs_human or route_security.
